'''Tul Bulba''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who owned and managed a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] called [[The Dark Side of the Planet]], in [[Nuba City]], [[Nubia/Legends|Nubia]].<ref name="CatCW" />
